features.heading: Everything you need
features.descPatient: Pillo was built with you in mind. Every feature was designed to make your daily health management easier.
features.descCaregiver: A comprehensive tool for monitoring your loved ones' health. All features available in one place.

showcase.heading: Everything under control
showcase.description: An intuitive interface designed with older adults and their caregivers in mind.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.subheading: Have questions? Check our FAQ or get in touch with us.
faq.contactPrompt: Didn't find the answer you were looking for?

contact.subtitle: Write to us
contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have a question or want to get in touch?
contact.attachHint: Max 3 files, 2 MB each (PNG, JPG, PDF, TXT…)
contact.attachTooMany: You can attach a maximum of 3 files.
contact.privacy: Your data is used solely to reply to your message.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

testing.seoDesc: Join the Pillo beta programme. Download the app via TestFlight (iOS) or Google Play (Android).
testing.heading: Test Pillo
testing.subheading: You're invited to try the early version of Pillo. Choose your platform below and help us shape the app.
testing.finePrint: This is a pre-release build. Features and design may change.

androidForm.title: Android beta
androidForm.description: Android testing is currently invite-only. Leave your email and we'll reach out when a spot opens up.

download.headline: Take care of yourself
